---
page-layout: full
toc: false
---

::: {.homepage}

::: {.sidebar}
![](files/img/Tapia_Theodore_main_large.jpg)


<h3 class="profile-name">Fedor V. Gerasimov</h3>  
PhD student in Mathematics  
Rice University

**Email:** fg50 [at] rice [dot] edu  
**CV:** [PDF](files/Fedor_Gerasimov_CV.pdf){target="_blank" rel="noopener"}  
**GitHub:** [fedor-gerasimov-50](https://github.com/fedor-gerasimov-50){target="_blank" rel="noopener"}  
**LinkedIn:** [Fedor Gerasimov](https://www.linkedin.com/in/fedor-gerasimov-450352238/){target="_blank" rel="noopener"}
:::


::: {.main-content}

## About

I am a PhD student in Mathematics at Rice University, advised by [Gregory Chambers](https://profiles.rice.edu/faculty/gregory-chambers){target="_blank" rel="noopener"}.

My research interests are in discrete, convex, and computational geometry. I am especially interested in polyhedral geometry, unfoldings of convex polyhedra, and combinatorial/topological methods in geometry. See the [Research](contents/research/research.qmd) page for more details.

Before joining the Mathematics Department, I worked in the [Department of Computational Applied Mathematics and Operations Research](https://cmor.rice.edu/){target="_blank" rel="noopener"} (CMOR) at Rice University with [Matthias Heinkenschloss](https://profiles.rice.edu/faculty/matthias-heinkenschloss){target="_blank" rel="noopener"} on parameter identifiability and local solution manifolds of nonlinear least squares problems.

I received my B.Sc. in Applied Mathematics and Computer Science from the Moscow Institute of Physics and Technology in 2023. My undergraduate thesis, supervised by [Alexander Polyanskii](https://polyanskii.com/){target="_blank" rel="noopener"}, studied blocking and covering numbers of convex bodies.

## Publications

- Andrey S. Shutov and Fedor V. Gerasimov, [On an Interesting Circle in a Triangle](https://old.mccme.ru//circles//oim/mmks/works2019/shutgera2.pdf){target="_blank" rel="noopener"}  
Moscow Mathematical Conference of High School Students, 2019.


## Selected talks and posters

- **Exploring Local Solution Manifolds of Nonlinear Least Squares Problems**  
Poster presented at [RTG NASC 2024](https://rtg-nasc.rice.edu/news-and-events/annual-rtg-workshop){target="_blank" rel="noopener"}, Rice University, and the [SIAM TX/LA 2024 Section Annual Meeting](https://math.artsandsciences.baylor.edu/conferences/siam-conference){target="_blank" rel="noopener"}, Baylor University.  
[Poster](files/posters/LSQSolutionManifold.pdf){target="_blank" rel="noopener"} · [Abstract](files/posters/LSQSolutionManifold-abstract.qmd){target="_blank" rel="noopener"}
- **On an Interesting Circle in a Triangle**  
  Presented at the [Moscow Mathematical Conference of High School Students](https://old.mccme.ru//mmks//index_eng.htm), 2019.  
  Awarded Best Project.  
  [Paper](https://old.mccme.ru//circles//oim/mmks/works2019/shutgera2.pdf){target="_blank" rel="noopener"}

:::

:::
